localized_texts.text: Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park

Enjoy a fun day at Genting SkyWorlds theme park with this day pass! Explore all 9 uniquely-themed worlds and make sure to hop on the 26 rides and attractions. Bring the whole family for a full day of fun and adventure!
Explore all 9 uniquely-themed worlds and make sure to hop on the 26 rides and attractions.
Rides and Attractions: The major rides you should prioritize are Planet of the Apes, Independence Day, Acorn Adventure, and the Epic water ride.
Robots Rivet Town: Assemble for non-stop family fun in the vibrant world of Robots!
Ice Age: A pre-historic adventure with attractions inspired by the globally recognized franchise, Ice Age.
Central Park: Gather in the buzzing town square to experience the best of world-class attractions, dining, retail and live entertainment.
Explore Our Worlds:

- Studio Plaza: Begin the day's adventure at the majestic Studio Plaza. As a celebration of all things cinema, find your favourite movie characters in all shapes and forms - carved into the golden interiors, displayed at the 360° Legends Cinema or as collectibles in our exciting dining and retail stores!

- Eagle Mountain: Step into the heat of a Californian desert right here at Eagle Mountain. As Torque and Wrench prepare for the infamous race of Mad Ramp Peak, grab a burger or two from the food trucks nearby or have a browse around the industrial themed Freedom Shop!

- Central Park: Gather in the buzzing town square to experience the best of world-class attractions, dining, retail and live entertainment. Whether it's a visit to the Natural History Museum or the marvellous fountain show at the Lake of Dreams, Central Park is where fun, excitement and memory-lasting moments meet.
- Andromed Base: In this thrilling galactic escapade, your survival on Andromeda Base is put to the test in various challenges, including the looming Terraform Tower of terror!

- Liberty Lane: Inspired by the streets of San Francisco, this thriving neighbourhood comes to life with unique stores, food locations, and an exhilarating attraction from Planet of the Apes – a first-in-the-world, designed exclusively for Genting SkyWorlds.
- Robots Rivet Town: Assemble for non-stop family fun in the vibrant world of Robots!
- Ice Age: A pre-historic adventure with attractions inspired by the globally recognized franchise, Ice Age. Experience mammoth-sized fun for everyone in the family!
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Resorts World Genting official website for any updates of operation hours.
Weather: Located 6,000ft above sea level, the weather does change often including cloudy conditions and rain. Kindly visit the official website for more info.
Restrictions: Admission to the attractions is restricted by age and height requirements.
What’s included: Standard Admission
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing Counter
How to use: Customer is only able to book the Virtual Queue (VQ) reservation after customer scan at the turnstile on their actual visit date.
How to use: Customer is to scan the QR code at Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park’s turnstile, register biometric before enter to the park.
How to use: For customer that do not download the Genting SkyWorlds App, they MUST retain their admission ticket for multiple entry to the park.
How to use: Please be aware - Do not activate or link your ticket codes until you are at the attraction. Activating them in advance may lead to the tickets expiring.

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket valid on selected date only. Malaysian rates valid for Malaysian Citizens only (physical MyKad required for verification). Non-Malaysian rates apply to international travelers. Eligibility Guests must purchase the correct ticket type. Child ticket is based on height, not age (Child above 110cm must purchase Adult ticket). Adult: Above 110cm height. Child: 90cm – 110cm height. Free admission: Children below 90cm height. Senior: Aged 60 and above. Wrong ticket purchases require top-up to Walk-In rate. Customers must contact the original purchase channel for ticket issues. Rainy Day Guarantee applies only to eligible ticket types and valid purchase channels. Attraction Access Subject to rides and attractions availability on the day of visit. Some rides, attractions, entertainment, or outlets may be unavailable, modified, or operating at reduced capacity. Rainy Day Guarantee free return applies only if it rains continuously for one hour during park operating hours. Additional Information Tickets are non-transferable, non-refundable, and not for resale. No validity date changes allowed after purchase. Guests must keep confirmation email and original ticket for verification. Free return visit requires original ticket and mobile app push notification. For more information on the Free return visit, please refer more information from the link: https://www.gentingskyworlds.com/en/tickets/rainy-day-guarantee.html No cash alternative for Rainy Day Guarantee. Malaysian law applies to all Terms & Conditions. English version prevails if translation conflicts occur. Important Notes Rainy Day Guarantee can only be used once per original ticket transaction. Weather determination is recorded by Genting SkyWorlds and is final. Not valid with other promotions. If it rains again during return visit, no additional free visit will be given. Excludes add-ons such as parking, Skyway, Photo+, VQ, etc. Certain ticket types (complimentary, annual pass, multi-day, combo, corporate packages) are excluded.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
What’s included: Non-Malaysian Adult tickets include an RM10 e-voucher, redeemable at F&B or retail outlets in Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park.

Terms & Conditions – RM 10 F&B OR Retail e-Voucher Each 2026 Genting SkyWorlds (Applicable to Non MyKad – 1 Day Ticket (Standard - Above 110cm) ticket holder is entitled to one (01) RM10 e-voucher, which can be utilized at either F&B or Retail outlet at Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park. Please present the original e-voucher QR code from the Genting SkyWorlds app upon redemption. Any screenshot or photocopy of the e-voucher is not acceptable. The e-voucher is valid only on the same day of visits to Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park. Once redeemed, the e-voucher is considered utilised and is non-refundable, nontransferable, and non-exchangeable for cash or other goods. The e-voucher can be combined with up to four (04) vouchers per transaction, provided the e-voucher is valid. The e-voucher is applicable at any participating outlets, including the following F&B and Retail locations within Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park (subject to operating hours) Any unutilised amount will be forfeited. No refund, exchange, or extension will be permitted. The Management reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions at any time without prior notice. Other terms and conditions may apply
1 Day Ticket (Malaysian)
1 Day Ticket (Non-Malaysian)
